site.title: VCCA | Varanasi Corporate Cricket Authority
site.description: VCCA is dedicated to promoting a professional, transparent, and inclusive corporate cricket culture in Varanasi.
site.heroText: The authority organizes tournaments that foster networking, fitness, and sportsmanship among working professionals through identity-based corporate cricket.

about.title: Our Story
about.content: VCCA was created to bring working professionals in Varanasi together through sport, mentorship, and healthy competition. The authority believes that cricket should be played with identity, dignity, and fairness.

about.title: Why VCCA
about.content: Every tournament is designed to balance competitiveness with transparency. Teams represent real identities, players are verified, and the spirit of the game remains central.

about.title: Mission
about.content: To promote corporate cricket as a powerful tool for team bonding, professional networking, fitness, and community pride in Varanasi.

about.title: Vision
about.content: To become the most trusted platform for identity-based corporate cricket in Eastern Uttar Pradesh and beyond.

about.title: Core Values
about.content: Fair Competition, One Identity, Transparency, Respect, Sportsmanship, Team Bonding.

organization.name: Founder
organization.bio: The founding architect behind VCCA's identity-based tournament model.

organization.name: President
organization.bio: Guides policy, partnerships, and the strategic growth of the trust.

organization.name: Vice President
organization.bio: Oversees event delivery, stakeholder coordination, and member engagement.

organization.name: Secretary
organization.bio: Manages communications, registrations, and day-to-day records.

organization.name: Joint Secretary
organization.bio: Supports administrative execution and volunteer coordination.

organization.name: Treasurer
organization.bio: Handles budgets, sponsorships, and transparent financial planning.

organization.name: Tournament Director
organization.bio: Shapes rules, schedules, and tournament operations.

organization.name: Media Head
organization.bio: Leads promotion, content, and community storytelling.

organization.name: Technical Head
organization.bio: Ensures scoring, logistics, and digital support remain smooth.

organization.name: Umpire Panel
organization.bio: Ensures fair play and rule adherence on the field.

organization.name: Volunteers
organization.bio: Power the event logistics, hospitality, and community engagement.

tournaments.name: Corporate League
tournaments.description: A professional league for employee-led teams representing recognized organizations.
tournaments.schedule: Weekend matches with a full round-robin format and knockout finals.
tournaments.rules: Eligibility is verified before the tournament and captain declarations are mandatory.
tournaments.points: 8 teams, 6 league games, top 4 advance to semis.
tournaments.awards: Best Batter, Best Bowler, Best All-rounder, Fair Play Trophy

tournaments.name: Government Services Cup
tournaments.description: A high-energy competition for government and public sector departments.
tournaments.schedule: Hosted in a single-day knockout format for fast-paced participation.
tournaments.rules: All teams must present official department proof during registration.
tournaments.awards: Spirit of the Game, Best Captain, Most Valuable Player

tournaments.name: Banking Championship
tournaments.description: A festival for banking professionals to play with pride and competitive spirit.
tournaments.schedule: Two-day tournament with league stages and semifinal showdowns.
tournaments.rules: Only players tied to the registered bank entity are eligible.
tournaments.points: 10 teams, 2 groups, top 2 from each advance.
tournaments.awards: Champion Trophy, Rising Star, Team Discipline Award

teams.name: TCS Titans
teams.description: A disciplined unit with balanced batting and sharp fielding.

teams.name: Infosys Warriors
teams.description: Known for strong all-round depth and calm leadership under pressure.

teams.name: Capgemini Royals
teams.description: A charismatic team with bold batting and dependable bowling.

photos.title: Opening Ceremony
photos.caption: A warm welcome to all participating teams.

videos.title: Match Highlights
videos.caption: Short highlights from the latest league fixture.

videos.title: Community Message
videos.caption: VCCA's leaders on the future of corporate cricket.

rules.title: Tournament Rules
rules.content: VCCA tournaments follow clear eligibility, match conduct, and fair play rules designed for corporate cricket.

rules.title: Player Eligibility
rules.content: All players must belong genuinely to the organization they represent and provide acceptable proof such as employee ID, appointment letter or official email ID.

rules.title: Code of Conduct
rules.content: Players, officials, and teams must maintain respect, sportsmanship, and transparency at all times. Abusive behavior or misconduct may result in disqualification.

rules.title: Umpire Rules
rules.content: The umpire panel has final authority on the field. Teams must cooperate with officials and respect decisions.

rules.title: Dispute Resolution
rules.content: All protests must be submitted in writing with supporting evidence. The Tournament Committee decision is final and binding.

rules.title: Rain Rules
rules.content: Matches affected by weather will follow standard revisions and revised targets as per the tournament format.

rules.title: Player Transfer Rules
rules.content: Transfers or replacements are allowed only when the new player satisfies the original eligibility criteria of the team.

join.title: Join VCCA
join.description: Register a team or express interest to participate in the next corporate cricket tournament. We welcome companies, departments, institutions, and registered groups.
